faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for squirrel emergencies in Perth Amboy and surrounding Middlesex County areas. faqs.question: What methods do you use for squirrel removal?
faqs.answer: We use humane, effective methods including live trapping, one-way exclusion doors, and complete entry point sealing. Our process includes thorough attic inspection, removal of all squirrels, sanitization and deodorization of affected areas, repair of damaged insulation or wiring, and guaranteed exclusion to prevent re-entry.

faqs.question: Are squirrels common in Perth Amboy waterfront properties?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels are very common throughout Perth Amboy, including waterfront areas. The city's mature trees, proximity to parks, and mix of older homes with accessible entry points create ideal conditions for squirrel populations. Fall and winter are peak times when squirrels seek warm shelter in attics and walls.
